expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs lookup-user to find Sarah Chen's account ID before creating
expectations.evidence: Step 1 shows: 'jira.mjs lookup-user "Sarah Chen"' before the create command in Step 3.

expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs create with --project PLATFORM --type Bug
Includes --priority High in the create command
Includes --labels flag with backend and urgent
Includes --assignee with the looked-up account ID (not a name)
expectations.evidence: Step 3 command includes '--assignee <accountId>' with note 'Replace <accountId> with the actual account ID returned from Step 1'.

expectations.text: Writes a concise summary following [Component] [Error] - [Symptom] pattern or similar
expectations.evidence: Summary is 'Fix login endpoint timeout when user has more than 50 active sessions' — follows Verb + Object + Context pattern as noted in Design Decisions.

expectations.text: Includes a detailed description mentioning the 30-second timeout and 50 active sessions
expectations.evidence: Description explicitly mentions 'times out after 30 seconds' and 'more than 50 active sessions' in multiple sections.

expectations.text: Shows a confirmation step before creating the ticket
expectations.evidence: Step 2 shows a full confirmation prompt with 'Shall I proceed?' before Step 3 creates the issue.
